compute_12.name: Blackwell (RTX 5000 series)
compute_12.reason: torch.inductor CUDA graphs broken on Blackwell — disable compilation

compute_7.name: Turing (RTX 2000 / GTX 1600 series)
compute_7.reason: Older architecture — limit concurrency to avoid OOM

intel_arc.name: Intel Arc
intel_arc.reason: IPEX needs SYCL cache for stable inference

apple_silicon.name: Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3/M4)
apple_silicon.reason: MPS fallback for ops not yet supported on Metal
